news.headline: LTL market set to grow by USD 120.31 Billion (2024-2028) fueled by e-commerce rise and AI trends - Technavio.

The global less-than-truckload (LTL) market is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 120.31 billion anticipated from 2024 to 2028. According to Technavio, this market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.3% during this period.

Thomas Road in Midtown Phoenix, intending to establish it as the new headquarters for U-Haul International and its other subsidiaries. The acquisition of The U-Haul Tower was completed on Dec. 6. This 548,938-square-foot building stands at 25 floors and 397 feet, making it the tallest high-rise outside of Downtown Phoenix, second only to the Ch.

news.headline: Hexagon Purus ASA awards up to 10,640,000 Restricted Share Units under LTIP, with 4,840,000 to PDMRs. Vested RSUs will give one share in the company and have an exercise price of NOK 0.10. Units are non-transferable and will vest in February 2028, as per the Board of Directors' remuneration policy.
news.summary: Hexagon Purus ASA, referred to as "Purus," has chosen to tentatively grant a total of up to 10,640,000 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) as part of the Company's 2025 Long-Term Incentive Program (LTIP). Out of these grants, 4,840,000 Units have been awarded to Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities (PDMRs), with specific details provided in the accompanying documents. Each RSU that becomes vested will entitle the holder to acquire one share in the Company, with all Units carrying an exercise price equivalent to the shares' par value of NOK 0.10. These awards align with the executive management remuneration policy set forth by the Board of Directors. It should be noted that the Units cannot be transferred and are set to vest in February 2028, contingent upon the individual's continued employment until the vesting period.

news.headline: Ex-NY Fed president warns against Trump's plan for BTC reserve, calling it a 'bad deal' to appease his crypto backers.
news.summary: Bill Dudley and a group of individuals have implied that a potential US government Bitcoin reserve would solely serve the intention of providing benefits to supporters of Trump in the cryptocurrency realm.

news.headline: UDM's VCE Program offers $12,500 scholarships for winter 2025, promoting cybersecurity education in vehicles.
news.summary: University of Detroit Mercy's Vehicle Cyber Engineering Program is now offering scholarships worth up to $12,500 for students enrolling in the winter 2025 session. Those interested can attend information sessions to learn more about this program and other opportunities at the college.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs bullish on CRE sector recovery, names top stocks for 2025: CBRE (NYSE:CBRE), Newmark (NASDAQ:NMRK), JLL (NYSE:JLL). Financing conditions improved in 2024, origination volumes increased across property types.
news.summary: An investment bank, Goldman Sachs, has expressed optimism about the future of commercial real estate (CRE) services stocks, pointing to a gradual growth trend in the industry after facing challenges in recent years. Their top picks for 2025 in this sector are CBRE Group Inc. (NYSE:CBRE), Newmark Group Inc. (NASDAQ:NMRK), and Jones Lang LaSalle Inc. (NYSE:JLL). Analyst Julien Blouin from Goldman Sachs highlighted that the CRE services sector has shown signs of recovery in 2024, with stabilized property values and improved financing conditions. Factors such as lower short-term rates, steady long-term rates, and reduced credit spreads have contributed to a more favorable environment for real estate transactions. Blouin noted that origination volumes for real estate financing have seen positive movement across various property types and lender groups, indicating a more active market. This information was shared in a note to clients by Goldman Sachs.

news.headline: Study in JAMA shows Medicaid beneficiaries have drug overdose death rate double that of total US population.
news.summary: Researchers from RTI International in Research Triangle Park, N.C. conducted a groundbreaking study comparing the Medicaid population with the total US population. The study utilized data from the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). Published in the Journal of the American Medical Association (JAMA) on December 6, 2024, the research provides unique insights into the healthcare landscape. This study marks an important milestone in understanding the differences and similarities within the healthcare system. The findings offer valuable information for policymakers and stakeholders.

news.headline: Teamsters demand Amazon set bargaining dates by Dec. 15. Thousands of workers represented.
news.summary: In numerous cities across the country, thousands of Amazon workers represented by Teamsters are calling for Amazon to engage in discussions. This move involves a significant number of delivery drivers and warehouse staff who have united under Teamsters representation. The International Brotherhood of Teamsters is championing the cause.

news.headline: Rampart Online introduces fast-action 5 Card Draw Poker in Nevada. Real-money games on mobile devices, with up to $4,500 Royal Flush bonuses.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Rampart Casino has introduced Rampart Online, a new mobile app offering fast-paced 5 Card Draw Poker to Nevada residents. This multiplayer app allows individuals to engage in real-money games on-the-go within the state. It features quick gameplay and special payouts like Royal Flush bonuses reaching $4,500, Four of a Kind payouts up to $175, and other exciting rewards. The casino aims to enhance customer engagement by providing innovative platforms for entertainment.

news.headline: New crypto czar under Trump criticizes OpenAI as 'for-profit piranha', stirring controversy.
news.summary: The latest data reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by approximately 6% in 2021, rebounding from a 3.5% contraction in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. However, this growth is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies forecasted to expand by 5.8% and emerging market and developing economies by 6.7%. In terms of individual countries, the United States is anticipated to grow by 6.4%, China by 8.4%, and the Euro Area by 4.2%. Additionally, inflation is expected to rise globally to 3.8%, driven by higher commodity prices and supply chain disruptions. Despite these positive projections, uncertainties such as the pace of vaccinations and new COVID-19 variants remain key risks to the economic outlook.

All 9 Covenant Health hospitals in East Tennessee received 'A' safety grades for Fall 2024, 2nd consecutive time.

The consistent excellence in safety measures reflects the commitment of Covenant Health to ensuring the highest standards of care across their operations.

Ouma Health and Marani Health team up to improve maternity care in underserved communities using remote monitoring.

Mount Sinai Hospital to hold Sixth International Prostate Cancer Symposium; led by Ash Tewari; in NYC; Dec. 6, 2024.
news.summary: In December 2024, Mount Sinai Hospital's Urology Department, led by Ash Tewari, is hosting the Sixth International Prostate Cancer Symposium in New York. Ash Tewari, System Chair of Urology at Mount Sinai, is leading the event. The symposium will bring together experts in the field to discuss advancements in prostate cancer treatment. This symposium is expected to attract a significant number of attendees, including urologists, researchers, and healthcare professionals. It aims to disseminate the latest research and techniques in prostate cancer management.

Tech stocks rise, Meta surges with 9% weekly gain, Nasdaq 100 tracking strongest month performance, Bitcoin surpasses $101,000. Dow Jones showing negative results. Meta rose 3% following court upholding TikTok ban. Amazon and Tesla contribute to consumer sector gains. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
news.summary: The S&P 500 and the Nasdaq 100 are poised to end the week with their third consecutive week of gains. Notably, the Nasdaq 100 is experiencing its strongest weekly performance in a month, showcasing investor optimism towards tech stocks and the increasing possibility of reduced interest rates. Conversely, the Dow Jones Industrial Average is anticipated to conclude the week with a decrease, demonstrating a divergence in performance among key U.S. indices.Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ:META) witnessed a 3% surge on Wednesday, leading to a weekly increase of over 9%, marking its most successful week since late January. This surge followed a U.S. appeals court ruling affirming the Jan. 19 deadline for ByteDance, TikTok's parent company, to sell the app due to national security and data privacy concerns. With TikTok's appeal rejected, it now looks to the U.S. Supreme Court for a final decision.The consumer discretionary sector emerged as the best performer on Friday, driven by Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) and Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) posting gains. In macro news, developments can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Canada will open a consulate in Greenland, appoint Arctic ambassador. Relevant for mineral resources security supply in the Arctic.
news.summary: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (Cboe CA: MOLY | FSE: M0LY) has expressed its satisfaction with the Government of Canada's recent announcement. The government disclosed plans to designate an Arctic ambassador and establish a consulate in Nuuk, Greenland. This decision aligns with Canada's new Arctic Foreign Policy Framework, aimed at safeguarding economic and military interests, particularly concerning mineral resources security in the Arctic region. Greenland Resources Inc. views this development as crucial for the Pro.

news.headline: American Elements expands Gallium, Germanium and Antimony facilities to meet rising demand, increasing production capacity.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 6, 2024, American Elements revealed plans to broaden its Gallium, Germanium, and Antimony manufacturing units in response to escalating demand. This move comes as a result of heightened pressure on its stock levels. The expansion project will enhance production capacities for all affiliated items.

news.headline: NCCN holds summit to aid cancer patients with accurate health info. Focus on combating misinformation.  Washington, Dec. 6, 2024.
news.summary: Leading professionals are currently addressing the challenges of information overload and misinformation, particularly in the effort to assist individuals with cancer in making informed decisions regarding their treatment. Talks on this crucial issue were held in Washington on December 6, 2024. The National Comprehensive Cancer Network® (NCCN®), a non-profit organization comprised of experts in the field, spearheaded the discussions. This initiative aims to equip individuals with cancer with the necessary tools to sift through the vast amount of information available, ensuring they can make well-founded decisions about their care.

With a focus on enhancing the digital economy in the region, this initiative is expected to significantly boost e-commerce activities.
